query:
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN auth_provider VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'manus',
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_id VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_id VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_profile_url VARCHAR(500) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_headline VARCHAR(300) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_industry VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN linkedin_location VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_phone VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_birthday DATE NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_gender VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_address_json JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_organizations_json JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN employer_name VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN job_title VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profile_enriched_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profile_enrichment_source VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN sign_in_data_json JSON NULL;

  ADD COLUMN google_address_json JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN google_organizations_json JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN employer_name VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN job_title VARCHAR(200) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profile_enriched_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN profile_enrichment_source VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN sign_in_data_json JSON NULL;
